mapper.select: SELECT A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, A.USR_ID, A.DISQ_DIV, A.SEQ, A.DISQ_UNIV_CD, B.UNIV_NM AS DISQ_UNIV_NM, A.INPT_ID, A.INPT_DT FROM EVA_POOL_DISQ_UNIV A JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_CD, UNIV_NM FROM EVA_UNIV ) B ON A.DISQ_UNIV_CD = B.UNIV_CD WHERE A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND A.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND A.POOL_CD = #{poolCd} AND A.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND A.DISQ_DIV = #{disq_div} ORDER BY A.SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 AS SEQ FROM EVA_POOL_DISQ_UNIV WHERE PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND POOL_CD = #{poolCd} AND USR_ID = #{usrId} AND DISQ_DIV = #{disq_div}
INSERT INTO EVA_POOL_DISQ_UNIV ( DI, PERIOD_DIV_CD, EVA_YEAR, POOL_CD, USR_ID, DISQ_DIV, SEQ, DISQ_UNIV_CD, INPT_ID, INPT_DT ) VALUES ( #{di}, #{periodDivCd}, #{evaYear}, #{poolCd}, #{usrId}, #{disq_div}, #{SEQ}, #{disqUnicCd}, #{usrId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, EC.CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, B.NAME, B.USR_ID, A.ST_DT, A.ED_DT, B.APPL_YN, TO_CHAR(APPL_YN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APPL_YN_DT, A.STATUS_CD, B.DISQ_YN_1, B.DISQ_YN_2 FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_APPL B ON A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = B.PERIOD_DIV_CD AND A.EVA_YEAR = B.EVA_YEAR AND A.POOL_CD = B.POOL_CD AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId} LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' WHERE A.STATUS_CD = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') BETWEEN A.ST_DT AND A.ED_DT ORDER BY A.PERIOD_DIV_CD DESC, A.EVA_YEAR DESC, EC.CODE_NM DESC

SELECT A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, EC.CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, B.NAME, B.USR_ID, A.ST_DT, A.ED_DT, B.APPL_YN, TO_CHAR(APPL_YN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APPL_YN_DT, A.STATUS_CD, B.DISQ_YN_1, B.DISQ_YN_2 FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_APPL B ON A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = B.PERIOD_DIV_CD AND A.EVA_YEAR = B.EVA_YEAR AND A.POOL_CD = B.POOL_CD AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId} LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' WHERE A.STATUS_CD = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') BETWEEN A.ST_DT AND A.ED_DT AND EC.CODE IN ('10520001', '10520003', '10520005') ORDER BY A.PERIOD_DIV_CD DESC, A.EVA_YEAR DESC, EC.CODE_NM DESC
SELECT JOB_CD FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE DI = #{di}
SELECT FILE_ID FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE DI = #{di}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO EVA_POOL_APPL A USING DUAL ON ( A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND A.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND A.POOL_CD = #{poolCd} AND A.USR_ID = #{usrId} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET POOL_CD_NM = #{poolCdNm}, NAME = #{name}, APPL_YN = #{applYn}, APPL_YN_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_CHNRG_ID = #{usrId}, LAST_CHG_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( DI, PERIOD_DIV_CD, EVA_YEAR, POOL_CD, POOL_CD_NM, USR_ID, NAME, APPL_YN, APPL_YN_DT, SEC_PLEDGE_YN, INPT_ID, INPT_DT, DISQ_YN_1, DISQ_YN_2 ) VALUES ( #{di}, #{periodDivCd}, #{evaYear}, #{poolCd}, #{poolCdNm}, #{usrId}, #{name}, #{applYn}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{usrId}, SYSDATE, #{disq1Univ}, #{disq2Univ} )
mapper.select: SELECT PERIOD_DIV_CD, EVA_YEAR, POOL_CD, POOL_CD_NM, ST_DT, ED_DT, STATUS_CD, INPT_ID, INPT_DT FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE WHERE PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND POOL_CD = #{poolCd}
